action: In Google Chrome, open the email website or application associated with your loaded profile as soon as possible.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: The task is to open the email website or application in Google Chrome. On the desktop, there is a Google Chrome icon (Box ID: 17). The first step is to open Google Chrome so I can then navigate to the email website.

Google Chrome has been opened as per the previous step. The next step is to navigate to the email website associated with the loaded profile. Typically, this would be Gmail if the profile is a Google account. The address bar is visible at the top of the Chrome window, so the next step is to click on the address bar to enter the email website URL.

Google Chrome is now open and the address bar has been clicked, so it is ready for input. The next logical step is to type the URL of the email website. Since the most common email service for a Google profile is Gmail, I will type 'gmail.com' into the address bar to proceed to the Gmail website.
The address bar in Google Chrome now contains 'gmail.com', but the browser has not yet navigated to the Gmail website. The next logical step is to press Enter to load the Gmail page.
